text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Specialized Information and Referral * Abused Transgender Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Assistive Technology Issues Blindness Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Deafness Disabilities Issues Down Syndrome Mental Health Issues Older Adult/Aging Issues Immigration Issues Abused Lesbians/Gay Individuals Abused Transgender Individuals LGBTQ2+ Issues Transgender Individuals Offender/Ex-Offender Issues Native American Community AIDS/HIV Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF BRADLEY ANGLE MARTHA'S FOLX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers confidential services such as support groups, resource referrals, safety planning, shelter and housing assistance, and basic needs assistance. Also offers related classes and workshops. Eligibility: Self-identified LGBTQ2+ folks of all genders who have experienced or are experiencing intimate partner violence Hours: Monday-Friday 10am-4pm; by appointment only Email (503) 232-1528 305 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
